data.title: merge-to-main tickets branch sync fails when untracked SNAPSHOT file conflicts with remote
data.description: During merge-to-main.sh execution for worktree-20260417-103317, the tickets branch sync phase failed with: 'error: The following untracked working tree files would be overwritten by merge: 250b-d21e/1776475611698087000-27185298-388c-4403-b0b8-d52147066a3b-SNAPSHOT.json'. The script aborted the rebase and skipped the tickets push. Root cause: a SNAPSHOT file exists as an untracked file in the tickets worktree and conflicts with the incoming remote merge. The main code push succeeded but ticket state is out of sync.
